title: Consortica
description: A Vanilla+ modpack focused around Iron's Spells and Spellbooks for the Consortica SMP.
body:
Consortica is a Vanilla+ modpack focused around Iron's Spells and Spellbooks. Players can explore the beautiful landscapes of Oh The Biomes We've Gone in search of artifacts needed to learn and develop their magical abilities. Player will need to work together to develop of functioning community of magic users, trading resources and expanding the reaches of their mystical endeavors.

While this pack is primarily intended for the use of the Consortica SMP, feel free to dive into the pack yourself and explore all the secrets there are to uncover!

Make sure to check out some of the resources used in the pack below!
- Vanilla Tweaks (Resource & Data packs): https://vanillatweaks.net/
